fascinatedutils.setting.hud_editor.title: HUD Editor
fascinatedutils.setting.shell.title: FascinatedUtils %s
fascinatedutils.setting.shell.profile_de: Are you sure you want to delete "%s"? This cannot be undone.
fascinatedutils.setting.shell.profile_re: Choose a unique name for this profile.
fascinatedutils.setting.shell.profile_po: Name the profile and choose whether to copy default settings.
fascinatedutils.setting.shell.profile_na: A profile with that name already exists.
Another profile already uses that name.
fascinatedutils.setting.shell.global_hud: Saves this setting everywhere it applies.
fascinatedutils.setting.ui.reset.tooltip: Click to reset to the defaults.
fascinatedutils.setting.shell_open_keybi: Key to open or close the HUD layout editor.
fascinatedutils.setting.show_self_namepl: Shows your nameplate above your player.
fascinatedutils.setting.show_server_list: Adds a server list button to the pause menu.
fascinatedutils.setting.confirm_disconne: Requires a second click to confirm disconnect.
fascinatedutils.setting.turbo_entities.d: Skips rendering some entities and block entities off-screen.
fascinatedutils.module.scoreboard.hide_s: Hides numeric scores on the sidebar scoreboard.
fascinatedutils.module.statuseffects.hid: Hides status effect icons and timers in the HUD.
fascinatedutils.module.status_effects.sh: Shows effect strength levels such as II or III.
fascinatedutils.module.status_effects.fl: How long before an effect expires it starts flashing (0 turns this off).
fascinatedutils.module.status_effects.so: Sorts status effects by remaining time or alphabetically.
fascinatedutils.module.status_effects.di: Chooses compact single-line or detailed two-line rendering.
fascinatedutils.module.titles.scale_titl: Scales how large title and subtitle text is rendered.
fascinatedutils.module.movement.smooth_m: Smooths camera movement while you look around.
fascinatedutils.module.movement.flight_s: Controls the flight speed multiplier when flight speed modifier is enabled.
fascinatedutils.module.zoom.zoom_key.des: Sets the key used to activate zoom.
fascinatedutils.module.zoom.zoom_level.d: Sets the default zoom magnification level.
fascinatedutils.module.zoom.scroll_to_zo: Lets the mouse wheel adjust zoom while zoom is active.
Smoothly interpolates zoom in and out.
fascinatedutils.module.freelook.freelook: Sets the key held to activate freelook.
fascinatedutils.module.tab.ping_mode.des: Chooses how latency is shown in the tab list.
Colors tab-list ping values based on latency quality.
fascinatedutils.module.tab.max_player_sl: Sets the maximum number of player slots displayed in the tab list.
fascinatedutils.module.tps.use_tps_color: Colors TPS text based on server performance.
fascinatedutils.module.cps.split_mouse_b: Shows separate CPS counts for left and right mouse buttons.
fascinatedutils.module.coordinates.block: Sets decimal precision for displayed coordinates.
fascinatedutils.module.show_hud_backgrou: Draws a background panel behind HUD text.
fascinatedutils.module.rounded_corners.d: Uses rounded corners for the HUD background panel.
fascinatedutils.module.rounding_radius.d: Controls the corner radius for rounded HUD panels.
fascinatedutils.module.show_border.descr: Draws an outline around the HUD panel.
Sets the thickness of the HUD panel border.
fascinatedutils.module.padding.descripti: Sets the inner padding around the HUD panel content.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.show_he: Shows the helmet slot in the armor widget.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.show_ch: Shows the chestplate slot in the armor widget.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.show_le: Shows the leggings slot in the armor widget.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.show_fe: Shows the boots slot in the armor widget.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.show_ma: Shows your main-hand item in the armor widget.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.show_of: Shows your off-hand item in the armor widget.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.hide_un: When enabled, durability numbers are not shown for items that have the Unbreakable component.
fascinatedutils.module.armor_hud.show_to: When enabled, shows the total count of a stackable item across your entire inventory instead of only the held stack.
fascinatedutils.module.clock.clock_forma: Chooses the date and time format shown by the clock widget.
fascinatedutils.module.ping.use_ping_col: Colors ping text based on latency quality.
fascinatedutils.module.system_cpu.use_cp: Colors CPU text based on usage level.
fascinatedutils.module.fps.show_one_perc: Displays 1%% low FPS alongside current FPS.
fascinatedutils.module.debug.turbo_stats: Shows Turbo Entities and Turbo Particles as a ratio or a percentage.
fascinatedutils.setting.reduce_mac_os_re: Reduces rendering resolution on macOS for better performance.
fascinatedutils.module.bossbar.hide_boss: Hides boss health text in the boss bar.
fascinatedutils.module.hurtcam.cancel_hu: Cancels the camera tilt animation when taking damage.
